description: Ed25519Signer::new, EcdsaP256Signer::new, and RsaPssSigner::new all return SecretError::InvalidUri when the backend's algorithm doesn't match. InvalidUri semantically means a malformed URI string, not a type mismatch at adapter construction. A caller pattern-matching on the error variant to distinguish URI parse failures from algorithm mismatches cannot do so. The error message string is the only distinguishing signal. Fix: use a more appropriate variant (e.g. InvalidAlgorithm or AlgorithmMismatch) or document clearly why InvalidUri is the right choice here.
title: Algorithm mismatch uses InvalidUri error variant
